sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Osasuna shows decent form with 3 wins and 1 draw in their last 5 matches, scoring consistently. Espanyol, however, is in poor form, losing 4 of their last 5 matches with defensive vulnerabilities, conceding in every game.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Recent head-to-head matches between Osasuna and Espanyol have been low-scoring, with the last two ending in draws (0-0 and 1-1). Osasuna remains unbeaten in their last 8 encounters against Espanyol.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Osasuna ranks higher in the league (9th) with a better goal-scoring record (45 goals) compared to Espanyol (16th, 38 goals). Osasuna's strong home form and Espanyol's missing key defenders could tilt the game in Osasuna's favor.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: Osasuna's Ante Budimir (20 goals) and Rubén García (recent form) are likely to be decisive. Espanyol's Javi Puado (11 goals) remains a threat, but their overall attacking output has been limited recently.
